'''鈭歡-m-r''' ('''kagamar''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yolk|yolk]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-m-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yolk|yolk]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歡-m-r
|-
! Lemma
| kagamar
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigamar|thigamar]] || [[word:jigamar|jigamar]] || [[word:shigamar|shigamar]] || [[word:kigamar|kigamar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugamar|thuthugamar]] || [[word:jujugamar|jujugamar]] || [[word:shushugamar|shushugamar]] || [[word:kukugamar|kukugamar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugamar|thugamar]] || [[word:jugamar|jugamar]] || [[word:shugamar|shugamar]] || [[word:kugamar|kugamar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thugamar|thugamar]] || [[word:jugamar|jugamar]] || [[word:shugamar|shugamar]] || [[word:kugamar|kugamar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thegamar|thegamar]] || [[word:jegamar|jegamar]] || [[word:shegamar|shegamar]] || [[word:kegamar|kegamar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothogamar|thothogamar]] || [[word:jojogamar|jojogamar]] || [[word:shoshogamar|shoshogamar]] || [[word:kokogamar|kokogamar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogamar|thogamar]] || [[word:jogamar|jogamar]] || [[word:shogamar|shogamar]] || [[word:kogamar|kogamar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogamar|thogamar]] || [[word:jogamar|jogamar]] || [[word:shogamar|shogamar]] || [[word:kogamar|kogamar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙gamar|th忙gamar]] || [[word:j忙gamar|j忙gamar]] || [[word:sh忙gamar|sh忙gamar]] || [[word:k忙gamar|k忙gamar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathagamar|thathagamar]] || [[word:jajagamar|jajagamar]] || [[word:shashagamar|shashagamar]] || [[word:kakagamar|kakagamar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagamar|thagamar]] || [[word:jagamar|jagamar]] || [[word:shagamar|shagamar]] || [[word:kagamar|kagamar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagamar|thagamar]] || [[word:jagamar|jagamar]] || [[word:shagamar|shagamar]] || [[word:kagamar|kagamar]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shagamar|shagamar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshagamar|goshagamar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishagamar|gokishagamar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shagamarn眉|shagamarn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshagamarnkn眉|goshagamarnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishagamarn眉|gokishagamarn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shagamarsh毛|shagamarsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshagamarnksh毛|goshagamarnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishagamarsh毛|gokishagamarsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagamaro|shagamaro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagamarnkro|goshagamarnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagamaro|gokishagamaro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shagamarmu|shagamarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagamarnkmu|goshagamarnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagamarmu|gokishagamarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shagamarsher|shagamarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshagamarnksher|goshagamarnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishagamarsher|gokishagamarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shagamarng|shagamarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshagamarnkng|goshagamarnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishagamarng|gokishagamarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shagamarya|shagamarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshagamarnkya|goshagamarnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishagamarya|gokishagamarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shagamaryam|shagamaryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshagamarnkyam|goshagamarnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishagamaryam|gokishagamaryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagamarn眉sh毛|shagamarn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagamarnkn眉sh毛|goshagamarnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagamarn眉sh毛|gokishagamarn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagamarn眉ro|shagamarn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagamarnkn眉ro|goshagamarnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagamarn眉ro|gokishagamarn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagamarn眉mu|shagamarn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagamarnkn眉mu|goshagamarnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagamarn眉mu|gokishagamarn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagamarsh毛n眉|shagamarsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagamarnksh毛n眉|goshagamarnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagamarsh毛n眉|gokishagamarsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagamarsh毛ro|shagamarsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagamarnksh毛ro|goshagamarnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagamarsh毛ro|gokishagamarsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagamarsh毛mu|shagamarsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagamarnksh毛mu|goshagamarnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagamarsh毛mu|gokishagamarsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagamaron眉|shagamaron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagamarnkron眉|goshagamarnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagamaron眉|gokishagamaron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagamarosh毛|shagamarosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagamarnkrosh毛|goshagamarnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagamarosh毛|gokishagamarosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagamaromu|shagamaromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagamarnkromu|goshagamarnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagamaromu|gokishagamaromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagamarmun眉|shagamarmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagamarnkmun眉|goshagamarnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagamarmun眉|gokishagamarmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagamarmush毛|shagamarmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagamarnkmush毛|goshagamarnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagamarmush毛|gokishagamarmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagamarmuro|shagamarmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagamarnkmuro|goshagamarnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagamarmuro|gokishagamarmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|91d6f4e}}
